_description: Weekly content production automation: generate social posts + email newsletter from a single brief
_activate: Import this JSON into n8n. Map the webhook URL and set BRAND_ID=brand-01.
name: Digital Ravagers — Weekly Content Pipeline

nodes.name: Content Brief Received
nodes._note: POST body: { topic, target_audience, cta, platforms: ['instagram','linkedin','email'] }

parameters.prompt: You are the content agent for Digital Ravagers. Using the brand voice: bold, systems-oriented, no-fluff. Write 3 platform-optimised posts for: {{$json.topic}}. Include Instagram (caption + hashtags), LinkedIn (professional insight), Twitter/X (punchy one-liner). CTA: {{$json.cta}}
Write a 300-word email newsletter for Digital Ravagers subscribers about: {{$json.topic}}. Subject line + preview text + body + CTA. Tone: direct and confident.
